title: anisoptera thurifera subsp. polyandra
intro: Anisoptera thurifera subsp. polyandra is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae, commonly known as a type of menispermaceous vine. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anisoptera thurifera subsp. polyandra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and swelling. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal teas or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
